tests.name: t1
assertions: References the --skill argument pointing at the SKILL.md
Mentions scoring the skill against assertions before improving
Mentions that improvements are kept (committed) and regressions reverted
Mentions verifying the API key is available before running

tests.name: t2
assertions: Describes scoring, making one targeted change, and re-scoring
Mentions keeping the change if the score improves and reverting otherwise
Mentions it repeats until a perfect score or max iterations
